title: KSM VGC Subcouncil Launches Digital Skills Acquisition Programme with 23 Trainees - FinancialEDGE
description: The Knights of Saint Mulumba (KSM), Victoria Garden City (VGC) Subcouncil has launched its Digital Skills Acquisition Programme, marking a significant step toward youth empowerment and digital capacity building. The programme, held over the weekend, was formally kicked off by the Worthy Grand Knight (WGK), Sir Tony Ukairo, with the admission of 23 trainees for
html: The Knights of Saint Mulumba (KSM), Victoria Garden City (VGC) Subcouncil has launched its Digital Skills Acquisition Programme, marking a significant step toward youth empowerment and digital capacity building.
